creator: nbm@rucus.ru.ac.za
text:
Entirely arbitrary patch that makes _PORT_USE touch the filenames
specified by {BUILD,CONFIGURE,etc}_COOKIE, and not simply
work/.build_cookie

I'm not sure why anyone would want to change the filenames, but it looks
messy for it not to work.

How-To-Repeat: 
(nbm@rucus) /usr/ports/net/micq# make PATCH_COOKIE=foo patch
===>  Extracting for micq-0.4.1
